visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman standing in a Costco warehouse, holding a large vacuum-packed beef shoulder with a joyful expression. The background features bright industrial lighting and supermarket aisles with refrigeration units and shopping carts. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a price tag and product description for US Prime Top Blade, highlighting a significant discount during a Black Friday event. (3) The perspective shifts to a freezer bin filled with numerous vacuum-packed beef bags, emphasizing volume and availability. (4) The scene transitions to a brightly lit kitchen where the woman, wearing clear plastic gloves, handles a large piece of deep red raw beef on white paper towels, showing its texture and marbling. (5) A series of close-up shots follow, documenting the process of slicing the meat with a sharp professional knife and trimming away the white connective tissue/tendons. (6) The processed beef is laid out on various plates, showcasing steak-sized portions and smaller trimmings, while the woman gestures toward the different categories of cuts. (7) The final shot displays cooked steak slices served on a black cast-iron griddle with grilled bell peppers, presented alongside fresh lettuce and dipping ingredients.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你的寶寶. [Variety]: 開箱. [Slogan]: 美國頂級嫩肩里肌 牛肉盲包. (2) [Subtitle]: 血淋淋的寶寶. (3) [Subtitle]: 黑五優惠 這個也折太多了吧. [Variety]: 這個也折太多了. (4) [Variety]: 頂級 Prime!. (5) [Subtitle]: 回去馬上切. (6) [Subtitle]: 現在看起來漂亮嗎. [Variety]: 現在看起來漂亮嗎. (7) [Subtitle]: 頂級的. (8) [Subtitle]: Prime. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個油花看起來就是. [Variety]: 非常的嫩. (10) [Subtitle]: 非常地嫩. (11) [Subtitle]: 筋很漂亮. [Variety]: 筋很漂亮. (12) [Subtitle]: 太好切了吧. [Variety]: 太好切了吧. (13) [Subtitle]: 超薄!好漂亮啊. [Variety]: 超薄!好漂亮啊. (14) [Subtitle]: 來看一下我們的筋. [Variety]: 來看一下我們的筋. (15) [Subtitle]: 完全不會硬. [Variety]: 完全不會硬. (16) [Subtitle]: 超薄的一個筋. [Variety]: 超薄的一個筋. (17) [Subtitle]: Prime 的油花真的很漂亮. (18) [Subtitle]: 1526元的肉總共分出這些小牛排. [Variety]: 1526元的肉總共分出這些小牛排. (19) [Subtitle]: 這是修過. [Variety]: 這是修過. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後這個是一些邊角. [Variety]: 然後這個是一些邊角. (21) [Subtitle]: 可以拿來做炒牛肉. [Slogan]: おいしい炒牛肉. (22) [Subtitle]: 總共有兩盤. [Variety]: 總共有兩盤. (23) [Subtitle]: 大概300~400克左右. [Variety]: 大概300~400克左右. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後剩下的這些是邊角料. [Variety]: 然後剩下的這些是邊角料. (25) [Subtitle]: 這些筋可以拿來燉湯. [Variety]: 這些筋可以拿來燉湯. (26) [Subtitle]: 很方便或是. (27) [Subtitle]: 給狗狗吃都很棒. (28) [Subtitle]: 這次肉很棒哦. [Variety]: 這次肉很棒哦. (29) [Subtitle]: 非常推薦給大家. [Variety]: 非常推薦給大家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, 2 female passers-by in the background of the Costco scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair wearing a beige cardigan and a black inner top, later wearing plastic gloves in the kitchen.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious warehouse store interior with high ceilings and heavy-duty shelving, followed by a modern domestic kitchen with a white tiled backsplash, stovetops, and condiment bottles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice speaking rapidly with an excited tone. A bright, high-tempo electronic pop BGM (124 BPM) starts immediately, featuring a driving synthesized bassline and a crisp 4/4 electronic drum beat. (2) A sharp 'Whoosh' transition SFX punctuates the shift between the supermarket scene and the price tag close-up. (3) Soft, muffled background chatter from the warehouse environment is briefly audible as a low-intensity ambient layer. (4) Prominent friction sounds of plastic gloves rustling are heard during the transition to the kitchen processing segment. (5) Clear, percussive thudding sounds of a knife striking a wooden cutting board are synchronized with the visual edits, occurring every few seconds alongside a 'Ding' notification SFX. (6) The vocal delivery remains enthusiastic but shifts to a descriptive narrative style as the speaker details the specific weights and costs of the meat portions. (7) The music reaches a concluding phrase as the speaker provides a final positive recommendation, ending on a bright harmonic resolution.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a value-for-money purchase of US Prime beef at Costco and demonstrate how to efficiently process a large vacuum-packed cut into different meal portions at home.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the Costco brand, store environment, and specific product labels to promote a deal.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high density of variety-show style text overlays and the upbeat BGM are characteristic of social-media content aimed at engagement and quick information delivery.
